name: Context Visualizer Dashboard
note: Shows one badge per prompt slot with a colon bar chart of its character count. Each colon = ~1000 chars (~250 tokens). Click any badge to refresh.

rules.name: Context Visualizer Dashboard
rules.note: Step 1 — snapshot the context stack as tab-separated rows (identifier, char count). Step 2 — map each row into a labelled bar and split the result into per-slot badges.

actions.note: Produces lines like: CNZ RAG<TAB>51200 — display name from preset, char count from content
Each line becomes one badge: 'CNZ RAG ::::::::::::.' — each colon is ~1000 chars, dot = >20% of a bucket
